description: A concentrated beam from the chest reactor. Maximum damage at the cost of leaving defenses completely open.
A strike combined with projecting an energy shield. Allows you to deal damage and absorb incoming attacks.
Channels power into a dense kinetic barrier while ramming the target.
A cheap holographic decoy with a physical hard-light shell to distract the enemy.
Summons an autonomous Iron Legion drone. It draws enemy fire and shoots back with light weaponry.
Deploys a heavy stationary Hulkbuster turret. Massive armor pool and automatic retaliation to attacks.
Calls down a piece of the Veronica orbital station. A massive, heavily armored structure that rains suppressing fire.
A rapid succession of fireballs. Cheap, effective, but offers zero protection.
A focused blast of intense heat that melts through enemy defenses.
Turns into a streak of fire, ramming the opponent at high speed.
A devastating omnidirectional explosion of fire. Maximum destructive power.
Creates a blazing barrier that damages the enemy while slightly softening their counter-attack.
Wraps himself in a dense sphere of plasma, burning attackers while absorbing impact.
Conjures a semi-sentient construct of pure fire to stand in the way and burn anyone who touches it.
A deadly bite with razor-sharp teeth. Pierces through almost any armor.
The symbiote goes out of control, turning into pure attacking mass.
A quick strike that morphs the symbiote to absorb the immediate kinetic feedback.
A heavy leaping pounce. The symbiote acts as a shock absorber during the collision.
Striking with thick tendrils from a mid-range, keeping the enemy at bay while dealing damage.
A massive armored strike. The symbiote hardens perfectly just before impact.
Creates a full clone from excess biomass. The clone takes heavy hits and bites back aggressively.
